title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 36.430 - Use of public buildings
text:
36.430.  Use of public buildings. — All officers and employees of the state and of municipalities and political subdivisions of the state shall allow the personnel division the reasonable use of public buildings under their control, and furnish heat, light and furniture, for any examination, hearing or investigation authorized by this law.  The personnel division shall pay to a municipality or political subdivision the reasonable cost of any such facilities furnished by it.
(L. 1945 p. 1157 § 41)
